title: dracophyllum frondosum
intro: Dracophyllum frondosum, also known as the needle bush, is a shrub native to Australia, characterized by its small, needle-like leaves and woody stems. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dracophyllum frondosum are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the needle bush is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
